title: manisuris balansae
intro: Manisuris balansae, also known as the Balansa clover, is a perennial legume plant native to Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Manisuris balansae include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and acting as a natural antioxidant. Manisuris balansae is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in traditional medicine preparations such as tinctures and infusions.
